To convert this to meters per minute, we multiply by 60 again, 2.6667 meters/second × 60 seconds = 160 meters/minute. To convert to meters per hour, we multiply by 60 again, 160 meters/minute × 60 minutes = 9600 meters/hour, or 9.6 meters/hour.
